title: Users and Permissions
deleteUserPrompt: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
activateDescription:
You need to set a new password to activate your Pulseem account.
After completing this process, you can log in to the system and start using it according to your account permissions.
activationLinkExpired:
Confirmation link expired.
Please request a new link from Administrator.
activationSuccess:
Congrats!
Your account has been successfully verified.
We invite you to log in

form.userRejected: User rejected (password length, password attempts, email exists, question & answer required)
form.confirmationLinkSent: Confirmation Link has been sent successfully
